Hi GTTers - First, thanks for all of your support! We're building an amazing community and I'm happy beyond what words can express. I feel very blessed to be part of this amazing "GTT movement" that it seems like we're building. Wowowow! Second, starting immediately, we are going to "cut up" all future GTT episodes into ~40min segments, even if this means a given episode may be broken into multiple 40min segments (e.g., the Windsurf episode is being broken into two parts). So you may start to see things like this: - "what is going on with Windsurf (1/N, 40min)" - "what is going on with Windsurf (2/N, 40min)" - "what is going on with Windsurf (3/3, end)" (or something like this) This will likely give you a hint into what's going on if you see these things. :) The *REASON* for this is YouTube seems to auto-dub and auto-subtitle our GTT VODs to ~15 languages *BUT ONLY IF* the videos are ~40mins or less. Given that at least 70% of our viewers are non-native English speakers, who use auto-dubbing and auto-subtitles for their main language, leveraging YouTube's auto-dubbing and auto-subtitling is a major boon to us getting our content to these folks. As such, our effort to split episodes into 40min or less parts is likely to positively help a large majority of GTTers as well as providing them with content that they can access as easily as native English speakers can access GTT content. That's all for now. Thank you all for helping build such an amazing community. I'm thrilled to have each and every one of you traveling with us on the GTT journey! Goju <3

Whoops Cursor - from Gemini. https://venturebeat.com/technology/cursors-composer-2-was-secretly-built-on-a-chinese-ai-model-and-it-exposes-a -- The AI system making headlines today is Composer 2, a newly launched coding model by the San Francisco-based AI startup Cursor. Here is a breakdown of what happened: The Accidental Output: Shortly after Cursor launched Composer 2—marketing it as a proprietary, "frontier-level" coding model—a developer inspecting the platform's API responses discovered a hidden internal model ID string that read kimi-k2p5-rl-0317-s515-fast. The Chinese Origin: That string revealed that Composer 2 was secretly built on top of Kimi K2.5, an open-source model developed by Moonshot AI (a prominent Chinese AI startup backed by Alibaba and Tencent). The Admission: Following the exposure on X (formerly Twitter) and Reddit, Cursor's leadership publicly confirmed the discovery. Co-founder Aman Sanger admitted it was a "miss" not to disclose the Kimi foundation in their initial launch announcement. The Defense: Cursor clarified that while Kimi K2.5 served as the base, only about 25% of the final model's computing power came from it. The remaining 75% was dedicated to Cursor's own rigorous reinforcement learning and fine-tuning specifically for coding tasks. Moonshot AI also weighed in, confirming that Cursor's commercial use of the model was fully authorized through a partnership with the inference platform Fireworks AI. The incident has sparked heavy debate in the tech community regarding transparency and the heavy reliance of Western AI startups on Chinese open-source models.

events.work: Whoops Cursor - from Gemini. https://venturebeat.com/technology/cursors-composer-2-was-secretly-built-on-a-chinese-ai-model-and-it-exposes-a -- The AI system making headlines today is Composer 2, a newly launched coding model by the San Francisco-based AI startup Cursor. Here is a breakdown of what happened: The Accidental Output: Shortly after Cursor launched Composer 2—marketing it as a proprietary, "frontier-level" coding model—a developer inspecting the platform's API responses discovered a hidden internal model ID string that read kimi-k2p5-rl-0317-s515-fast. The Chinese Origin: That string revealed that Composer 2 was secretly built on top of Kimi K2.5, an open-source model developed by Moonshot AI (a prominent Chinese AI startup backed by Alibaba and Tencent). The Admission: Following the exposure on X (formerly Twitter) and Reddit, Cursor's leadership publicly confirmed the discovery. Co-founder Aman Sanger admitted it was a "miss" not to disclose the Kimi foundation in their initial launch announcement. The Defense: Cursor clarified that while Kimi K2.5 served as the base, only about 25% of the final model's computing power came from it. The remaining 75% was dedicated to Cursor's own rigorous reinforcement learning and fine-tuning specifically for coding tasks. Moonshot AI also weighed in, confirming that Cursor's commercial use of the model was fully authorized through a partnership with the inference platform Fireworks AI. The incident has sparked heavy debate in the tech community regarding transparency and the heavy reliance of Western AI startups on Chinese open-source models.

events.work: Familia, I am in the deepest gratitude today as I enter my 27th cycle around the sun. 🦀♋️ This journey has been tne most fulfilling one that I could have chosen in this lifetime. A few years ago, I would’ve never thought that at this stage of life, I coulld honestly wake up every morning and be 100% sure that I was on the right path. Many twists and turns, doubts and regrets, challenges and blessings shaped my early 20s. I chose the road less traveled. But through it all, it led me to this community. It led me to teachings and teachers that have opened my heart so wide that words are not enough to describe. If you’ve ever felt that you’ve wanted to go deeper with my story, my dear friend and brother Michael Sandler has just published a very special podcast between us over on his channel. My invitation is that you watch it if your heart feels called 🫂 Here it is 👉 https://youtu.be/2n6NrVts4IQ?si=3oBThktN4yk0KkM8 And also, my greatest birthday gift and ask today would be to have this whole community signed up to my first ever LIVE (free) “Opening Ceremony” coming up on August 2nd. I will reveal some very special advancements and evolutions of this community. See you there 💫 👉 https://iamemilioortiz.com/the-opening-ceremony/

events.author: Goju Tech Talk
events.work: Hi GTTers - First, thanks for all of your support! We're building an amazing community and I'm happy beyond what words can express. I feel very blessed to be part of this amazing "GTT movement" that it seems like we're building. Wowowow! Second, starting immediately, we are going to "cut up" all future GTT episodes into ~40min segments, even if this means a given episode may be broken into multiple 40min segments (e.g., the Windsurf episode is being broken into two parts). So you may start to see things like this: - "what is going on with Windsurf (1/N, 40min)" - "what is going on with Windsurf (2/N, 40min)" - "what is going on with Windsurf (3/3, end)" (or something like this) This will likely give you a hint into what's going on if you see these things. :) The *REASON* for this is YouTube seems to auto-dub and auto-subtitle our GTT VODs to ~15 languages *BUT ONLY IF* the videos are ~40mins or less. Given that at least 70% of our viewers are non-native English speakers, who use auto-dubbing and auto-subtitles for their main language, leveraging YouTube's auto-dubbing and auto-subtitling is a major boon to us getting our content to these folks. As such, our effort to split episodes into 40min or less parts is likely to positively help a large majority of GTTers as well as providing them with content that they can access as easily as native English speakers can access GTT content. That's all for now. Thank you all for helping build such an amazing community. I'm thrilled to have each and every one of you traveling with us on the GTT journey! Goju <3

So if the goal of the evil is to veil and deny our divinity, when we live the best versions of ourselves, we have triumphed without fighting.” -Gregg Braden- When I heard Gregg Braden say this on our latest interview, something clicked deep inside me. We’re not here to fight darkness, we're here to be light. To live so fully in our truth, in our divinity, that there’s no space left for illusion. This is how we triumph. Not by waging a war… But by remembering who we are.

events.author: David Shapiro
events.work: Public Statement Regarding Liron Shapira After careful consideration, I've decided to publicly clarify my position regarding interactions with Liron Shapira, particularly our recent conversation. Liron Shapira approached me repeatedly, requesting a debate. Initially, I was open to this idea, provided he engaged with my written works and offered an apology for his previous disrespectful remarks (including explicitly calling me a "coward" on his YouTube channel, as reported by multiple individuals). In our most recent conversation, Liron repeatedly demonstrated behaviors consistent with evasion, manipulation, and goalpost-moving: 1. Denial and Backpedaling: Initially, he denied ever stating that humanity was "dead no matter what." When I confronted him with evidence (screenshots and multiple audience confirmations), he quickly shifted his stance, claiming he meant we were "likely doomed," aligning himself retroactively with probabilistic doom scenarios. This rapid pivoting constitutes explicit backpedaling when confronted with evidence. 2. Continuous Dodging of Simple Conditions: When explicitly asked if he would read my book (a common courtesy and a basic prerequisite for informed debate), he avoided committing clearly, introducing conditions such as insisting on an exchange of equal time. When asked directly about substantial contributions from his side (research, books, or code), he evaded specificity and referred me broadly to his YouTube channel instead. 3. Refusal to Apologize for Unprofessional Conduct: When directly confronted with his name-calling behavior (explicitly calling me a coward on his YouTube channel), he tacitly conceded to this but dismissed any responsibility, stating, "I don't see my behavior as inappropriate, so I will not apologize." 4. Manipulative Tactics and Attempts at Control: Liron repeatedly shifted the debate focus, suggesting alternative topics (such as analyzing a specific paper) rather than addressing my clear, initial conditions. This consistent behavior further confirmed my suspicion that he simply wanted to evade accountability. Given these circumstances, and after consulting closely with my inner circle—who unanimously described Liron as a troll and a bully—I have decided to disengage completely. I maintain a zero-tolerance policy toward bullying, disrespect, and manipulative behavior. Therefore, effective immediately, I have blocked Liron Shapira and will not entertain future interactions or debates with him. I firmly believe rewarding such conduct by providing a platform or my time would perpetuate toxic behavior, which I unequivocally refuse to support. Actions have consequences. I remain committed to productive and respectful discussions on AI alignment with anyone sincerely interested in meaningful dialogue. PS, I do have the receipts but I won't stoop so low as to publicly post private chats. I am, however, done with this fool.

events.author: Jesse Michels
events.work: 🚨Former Presidential Advisor Reveals He Directly Handled UFO Material🚨https://youtu.be/09KP8XVf5nY A 27 year old Harald Malmgren literally saved the world from nuclear catastrophe during The Cuban Missile Crisis when Secretary of Defense Robert McNamara and President JFK asked him to “buy time for diplomacy” by facing off against General Curtis “Bombs Away” LeMay. Malmgren, the youngest of the “whiz kids”, went on to become a presidential advisor not just to JFK, but LBJ, Nixon and Ford. He had a personal relationship with Putin and advised every Japanese Prime Minister since Tanaka in the 70’s, Giscard d’Estaing, Pompidou and others. He was assigned to “contain” Kissinger and worked closely with Howard Baker, George Schulz, Volcker and Mondale not to mention Nobel Prize winners Tom Schelling and Sir John Hicks. Unusually, he had ALL the so called Q Clearances. His credentials are unimpeachable. So it should make everyone question their reality when this man, at the end of his life and before tragically passing, felt compelled to pass on what he learned to humanity: earth-shattering revelations. He claimed these things in a 4 hour interview: 1. He held UFO (or UAP) material directly. This material came out of the plume of a nuclear test called Bluegill Triple Prime conducted at Johnston Atoll in the Marshall Islands in 1962. It was handed to him by Lawrence Preston Gise, director of the Albuquerque branch of the Atomic Energy Commission (who happens to be Jeff Bezos’ grandfather). 2. The Deputy Director of Plans for the CIA and the man who built and designed Area51, Richard Bissell, briefed Malmgren on “otherworld technologies”. This includes past crash retrievals like the Magenta crash in Lombardy, Italy in 1933 along with broader awareness of UFO appearances around tip of the spear technology development at sensitive Department of Energy sites across the country. 3. That a member of foreign intelligence sent Harald information on a secret antigravity-related collaboration between Tesla and Thomas Townsend Brown. 4. He told his daughter Pippa off air in his final hours that there had been UFO crash survivors (biologics) and he was shown a video of the “sole surviving extraterrestrial being” from one such crash (Roswell). 5. Malmgren says point blank that he believes JFK knew about UFOs long before becoming president (from his history in Naval Intelligence). He and LBJ raced out to Los Alamos right after Blugill Triple Prime to be briefed in person. He says that JFK’s desire to collaborate with the Soviets on UFOs, space exploration and denuclearization were core parts of the impetus to assassinate him. 6. Malmgren discusses the “Majestic” - the group who took it upon themselves to “protect” the world. They tracked him from a young age, he says. This is the first time anyone of this caliber has mentioned this name which is mostly associated with document leaks in the 80’s and 90’s that outline an “elite of the elite” military, intelligence and scientific group governing the UFO issue. Harald is a hero who saved the world (and more than once). There was more he held back and that he took to his grave. He was an angel amongst devils and his legacy should make all world leaders think twice, reflect and “lower the temperature” on the world stage when contemplating brinksmanship. We barely scratched the surface on what he likely had to say and will have to mull this over for years. But it’s a quantum leap forward for disclosure and simply can’t be ignored by members of the mainstream media. We are extremely grateful to Harald’s incredible daughter Pippa Malmgren for co-hosting this discussion. She was Special Assistant to President Bush and a member of The National Economic Council and a very heterodox thinker in her own right. She teased the truth from her father and helped him come forward with his critically important insights. She set the whole discussion up and we’re forever indebted for her entrusting us to help tell Harald’s story. She said that Bissell told my Dad - “because you’ll need to pass it along in the future at the right time”. At 89, she knew her father in turn had to relay this vital information, this time, on a broader stage as our multipolar nuclear world remains stuck in old paradigms. Australian Intelligence Analyst Geoffrey Cruikshank, who has gone deeper than anyone in the world on analyzing the Bluegill Triple Prime Test UFO incident, also conferred with Harald Malmgren to confirm the veracity of his foundational research. His research was essential to this piece. Rest in peace Harald Bernard Malmgren (July 13th 1935 - February 13th 2025).

Whenever a storms comes through my world, I know that in this space of zero point neutrality, all problems fade away. There’s no more fear. No more struggle. No more chaos. As we enter a new year, I want to take a moment to acknowledge this beautiful heart centered community. We started off 2024 with 20,000 people subscribed to this channel and we have grown in leaps and bounds. What this means is that more and more people are beginning to ask questions beyond themselves and are curious to understand the layers deep within themselves. I can already feel how much of a quantum leap 2025 will be for all of us. World events will reveal new truths; new voices and ideas will be heard. Mysteries will be remembered. Dormant potentials within us will be reawakened. There is nothing that I’m more excited about than the unfolding story of humanity. It’s a blessing to be part of this moment in history that the future generations will look back upon. We are all a monumental seed in this new story. Thank you for coming together, with your minds open and your hearts open. Thank you for trusting in me. Thank you for taking this journey. All our higher selves are so proud of us. We are only getting started 🚀 I love you all with my all my heart ✨🫂❤️‍🔥
